programs.title: Rocky Balboa
programs.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Antonio Darver, 2006. 30 years after his first fight, Rocky Balboa comes out of retirement and prepares for one last fight.

programs.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programs.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: Classic '70s police series. A new recruit joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but Regan doesn't think he's up to it.

programs.title: Minder
programs.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got a more important matter on his mind.

programs.title: Auto Mundial
programs.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
